name: @intentsolutionsio/shipwright
description: Describe your app in plain English — Shipwright builds, tests, and deploys it autonomously via a 9-phase pipeline.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install shipwright\\n  or /plugin install shipwright@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
